status.accessibility_permission: Accessibility permission required for auto-paste, please grant it in system settings

font.title: Display Font
font.subtitle: Globally change the text display font

startup.title: Launch at Startup
startup.subtitle: Automatically run in background after login, always ready

backend.title: Backend Node
backend.subtitle: US Ultra-fast Node (Groq) or CN Compliant Node (SiliconFlow)

hotkeys.title: Hotkeys & Triggers

refine.title: Refine Mode (Toggle)
refine.subtitle: Bind a global toggle key if you don't want to hold native Fn

translate.title: Translate Mode (Toggle)
translate.subtitle: Speak and immediately translate to target language

hotkeys.record_desc: Press your desired key combination directly on the keyboard...

target_lang.title: Target Language
target_lang.subtitle: Default language to translate into when trigger translate mode

voice_input.title: Click Fn for Voice Input
voice_input.desc: Hold Fn in any text box to speak, release to automatically refine and paste.

realtime_translate.title: Shift + Fn for Real-time Translation
realtime_translate.desc: Hold Shift and Fn for translation.

smart_format.title: Smart Formatting Assistant
smart_format.desc: The system will automatically record your frequent phrases and writing style.

history.title: Creation History
history.time_saved: Accumulated ${time} of typing time saved for you.
history.empty:
No records yet
Press Fn to start your first voice transcription

onboarding.step1_subtitle:
Hold Fn to record
Release to auto-refine and paste to active window
onboarding.step3_subtitle:
For seamless input
Please enable accessibility for Audio Translate Input in System Preferences > Security & Privacy
onboarding.step4_subtitle:
All set! Hold Fn and say something
Prepare for a whole new efficiency revolution
onboarding.mic_permission_subtitle:
Audio Translate Input needs microphone permission
to convert your voice into precise text
onboarding.hold_fn_hint: Hold Fn key and say something...
onboarding.trial_success: Trial successful! This is the magic of Audio Translate Input.
onboarding.click_to_simulate: (You can click this box to simulate a key press)
onboarding.accessibility_warning: Accessibility permission not granted. Please enable Audio Translate Input in the system settings dialog that appears.
